title: Path of Exile 3.29 — Curse of the Allflame

sections.title: The Curse of the Allflame Challenge League

rows.neu: New challenge league: dive ocean floor via Charts, board The Sovereign, build Voyages, feed items to ship's heart for ghostly outcomes, use Ducats to warp items. 40 challenges (8 Ruthless).
Standard, Hardcore, SSF; HC parented to Standard (death → continue in Standard). Private leagues supported.
Totem Pole decoration pieces from 19th challenge onward (every 3rd). MT rewards league-exclusive.
Two new Bloodline Classes added, one exclusive to Curse of the Allflame.
Empowers projectile/area/chaining-beam spells (more damage, enhanced coverage) but burdens you with an Affliction.
Empowers DoT spells; grants Hunger of Ghorr buff (periodic Fleshrend). Affliction.
Empowers Vaal spells: more damage, less soul gain prevention, refunds souls on use. Affliction.
Empowers next channelling spells (more damage, periodic lightning while channelling). Affliction.
Increased Chill/Shock effect; chilled enemies shocked by hits, shocked enemies chilled by hits.
Triggers Falling Crystal on Hit (abyssal soulstone slam). Supports Slam skills.
Infuses staff, lowers mana cost, boosts block; releases arcane wave on block.
Beam of holy light → imploding orb lingering with larger explosions.
Slam ground, consume Power Charges, call cascade of holy hammers in outward spiral.
Two-hand mace/staff sweep calling waves of holy hammers; Attack Speed affects rate.
Bloody scythe swipe, physical DoT debuff; blood charges (max 5) raise damage/cost.
POE2-style keyword inspection popups added (gradual rollout).
Any player can now use Expedition Detonator, Eldritch Altars, Harvest Plots, Sentinels in parties.
Volatile Vaal Orbs & Crystallised Rancour get dedicated Currency Stash Tab slots.
2 new default-unlocked: Reroll 3 Mods (3 Chaos), Reroll 1 Mod (8 Chaos).
Isla (Kingsmarch), Niko (Mine), Einhar (Menagerie) can now identify items.
Crafting Bench available in every Town from Act 2 onward.
Quieter Raised Spectre audio; Solaris Temple L1 waypoint moved; continued sound/art/env improvements.
Mercenaries found from Act 3 onward; duel for their item; win → ally for N areas. Guaranteed in Sceptre of God, Grand Arena, Ridge, Hidden Underbelly (no Rucksack).
Hired Mercs scale passive stats/skills to area level (max 68). Equip level capped by find-area level.
Request a Warrant to re-duel a Merc later (new items, same skills); tradeable. Each Merc grants Warrant once.

rows.old: No longer counts as party member (removes +item quantity/+rarity bonus; -life/-damage penalty also gone)
rows.neu: No longer counts as party member — no +item quantity/rarity, but also no -life/-damage penalty. (Loot bonus lost)
New Luminary Ascendancy: permanently Hire Mercenaries (up to 3 hired, 2 reserve, 1 active). Can change equipped items on hired Mercs.
Azadi Crest, Binds of Bloody Vengeance, The Ghastly Theatre, Hand of Heresy, Howlcrack, Scornflux: now Merc-encounter only, removed from core drop pool.
No longer from Heist Gem Chests; obtained from Mercenary encounters again.
Atlas Passive Tree support added; new Trarthan Scarabs (base, Infamy, Renown, Surprising Alliances).
Endgame Rucksacks no longer roll Transmutation/Augmentation Orbs. Searing Exarch Altars can drop Merc Scarabs. Merc info sheet added.
Abyssal Pits/cracks pre-opened; slaying enemies feeds souls, spawns the Abyssal legion (no more chasing cracks).
New Abyss Endgame Pinnacle Boss with its own new Unique items.
Abyss now exclusive source of Abyssal Jewels & Stygian Vises (jewels still rare in Delve Abyss biomes). Abyssal Delirium Orbs removed.
Abyssal Jewels can no longer roll: dmg vs Abyssal, minion dmg vs Abyssal, PDR vs Abyssal, PDR if not hit recently. Impale no longer on Hypnotic/Ghastly.
Base Abyss Scarab limit 5 (from 2). Extra-Abyss mods add 2 pits instead.
Of Edifice → Of Crystals (pits without reward make Abyssal Crystal). Of Profound Depth → Of the Consort (spawns Abyssal Consort).

Cold/Lightning Ailment eff 20% (was 15); Impale 8% (was 6); +34 Mana (was 40); 5% mana recoup (was 3); added spell dmg bumps; 8% Unholy Might on melee kill (was 5%); minion move spd 15% (was 10%); curse/elusive/blind adjustments.
4 Crystals in Domain of Timeless Conflict: place Enshrouded item → transforms to another Unique of same class with Vestigial implicit. Charge by killing, interact when full.
New currency from Legion Generals (Map areas): Karui/Imperial/Maraketh/Templar/Vaal Enshrouding Crystal. Cannot drop in Domain.
Encounter auto-breaks all Monsters/Chests/Sergeants/Generals at 90% broken.
Removed; converted to regular Timeless Emblems.
Eternal/Karui/Maraketh/Templar/Vaal Emblems reworked: +10% XP, +20% reward progress, +10% dmg, +10% Toughness per revive, plus emblem-specific per-revive bonuses.
No longer obtainable; Rog no longer applies random Incubator; Stash Affinity for Incubators removed.
Splinters only from Legion encounters + Kingsmarch runners. Generals drop more; Sergeants/Chests lower chance but bigger stacks. Emblematic passive 0.3%→Emblems (was 0.6%).
Gems can socket into any Equipment Socket regardless of colour match.
Socketed Gems gain +10% Quality in Red/Green/Blue Sockets if gem colour matches.
Item Sockets always White by default; small chance per socket to roll R/G/B (proportional to attribute req); chance scales with item level.
Now force one Non-White socket; rest roll normally. Higher item Quality → more Non-White chance. Rarer; no longer vendor-sold for Jewellers; Currency Exchange gold fee up.
White-socket outcome removed; now turns a random White Socket Non-White. Locus of Corruption all-white outcome removed → turns all White Non-White.
Currency adding sockets (Jeweller's, Tainted Jeweller's, Binding, Crafting Bench) always generates White sockets.
Trinket mods dropping Chromatics as Jewellers/Fusing removed; new mods drop Jewellers/Fusing as Chromatics. Bestiary 8-Chromatic craft → Rare 4-Link Helmet.
New bench: ≥2 Non-White (5 Chrom), ≥3 (20), ≥4 (75). Old R/G/B bench options removed. Horticrafting white-reforge removed.
Now always has Quality bonus from Socket Colour (was ignore-colour). Green socket +20% Quality (was +30%). Divine to worsen.
+100-200 Life/Mana/ES per Red/Green/Blue Socket (was +100). Divine to update.
Per-socket bonuses reworked +0.2-0.3m melee range per White. Divine to update.
Scaeva, Triad Grip, Untouched Soul, Bow/Staff/Two-Hand masteries, Omen of Blanching→Trichromatism, Vorici safehouse rewards reworked.
Talismans now have Enchantment Modifiers (not Implicits); no longer Corrupted by default.
Chance to drop from Red Beasts / Bestiary Bosses; each tied to a specific Beast. Cannot be Anointed; Enchant cannot be bench-removed.
Old Talisman base types no longer obtainable (still exist in Standard). Non-Unique Talismans only from Bestiary/Div Cards/Thane Jorgin.
Locusts now point to next Altar after an encounter.
Flask Charges restored between rooms (not Writhing Jar). Volatile Vaal Orbs obtainable as Sanctum rewards.
Now exclusive source of Catalysts; removed from Heist Demolition (→Map rewards), Expedition chests, Tujen, Ritual favours.
Channeling Verisium Ore: cannot be damaged or stunned.
Syndicate Leaders no longer drop Allflame Embers; Mastermind only drops Ember of Kulemak.
Avg Scarabs from chests doubled. Trapped Stash time limit 15s (was 10). Cluster Jewels from Trapped Stashes/Crafting Sprees max ilvl 83.
Fortification reward → Trapped Stash with Enshrouded Uniques (not Ruthless). Transportation reward → Trarthan Scarab chest.
Voidstone-completed Maps may manifest Anomalies (no Map item needed). Reflecting Mists & Nameless Seer now in their own Anomaly areas. Unaffected by Atlas tree/Fragments.
Reflect Map mods → Rare Monsters have Physical/Elemental Thorns (fixed reflect, mitigable). Red Tier: 800 phys / 1500 elem thorns. Reflect removed from Campaign Corrupted Side Areas.

Arachnid Nest, Basilica, Bazaar, Caldera, Cells, Channel, Colonnade, Colosseum, Conservatory, Crystal Ore, Desert, Desert Spring, Estuary, Forbidden Woods, Geode, Infested Valley, Laboratory, Malformation, Museum, Phantasmagoria, Pier, Plateau, Ramparts, Stagnation, Sunken City, Temple, Toxic Sewer, Vault.

Acid Caverns, Arena, Ashen Wood, Bog, Canyon, Carcass, Castle Ruins, Courtyard, Coves, Crimson Temple, Crimson Township, Cursed Crypt, Defiled Cathedral, Dig, Dry Sea, Dungeon, Lava Chamber, Lighthouse, Maze, Moon Temple, Mud Geyser, Necropolis, Pen, Racecourse, Sepulchre, Underground Sea, Wasteland, Wharf.
No longer obtainable as Map; accessible via random Atlas event node (harder/more rewarding).
Decayed Voidstone now connects Forge of the Phoenix, Pit of the Chimera, Lair of the Hydra (added to Maze of the Minotaur).

Pit of the Chimera: 1 wave/phase. Memory Thread Maps show target. Enshrouded Astrolabe→Deceptive Astrolabe. Remembered/Feared item-drop delay removed. Reflecting Mist currency more common, less modifier eff.
New cluster: Notable → T14+ Maps 4% chance Scrying Orb on completion; small passives → increased Div Card drop chance. Ruthless: Scarab bonuses.
New currency: stores the Map it dropped in; Scry that area's Div Cards onto an Atlas Map.
Ultimatum Boss drops 10 of a random Catalyst (was full stack).
Blueprints in your Maps 15% chance of special Implicit.
Avoid-all-Damage and Avoid-specific-Type are now additive. Descriptions adjusted.
Lowered Life of various Spectres (none above Meatsack): Unholy Aberrations, Originator-Influenced, Refinery Robot monsters.
All non-Spectre Minions no longer pause while attacking (big DPS for Dom Blow, Zombies, Golems, SRS, Skeletons).
'Increases/Reductions to Spell Damage apply to Attack Damage' replaced by Arcane Might keyword (descriptive only).
No longer Marked Enemy cannot Evade Attacks. Now 10% inc Effect of Marks per max Power Charge, 3% of Leech Instant per max Power Charge.
No longer Base Spell Crit = MH weapon. Now Spell Crit Bifurcates + 30% less Spell Crit.
New Notable (req Instruments of Virtue): Base Spell Crit = MH weapon.
+3 max Fanatic Charges (was +4). Fanaticism 5s (was 4), 75% less Cost (was 75% reduced).
New Notable (req Vile Bastion/Forbidden Power): gain Spirit Infusion/s while Channelling (max 5); ES recharge start, +dmg, +cost.
Notables shuffled for this league. See node list.
New (NE of Witch): 10% Cast Speed, 20% Mana Cost Efficiency of Spells, 3% Int.
New (NW of Templar): 8% Reservation Efficiency of Spells, 20% Cost Efficiency.
All reduced Cost of Skills on tree converted to Cost Efficiency at appropriate values.
Totem mastery crit (recent totem) 40% (was 60%). Shaman's Dominion 50% crit (was 60%); small passives +16% crit mult (was 20%).
Buff: Added Lightning = 10% Mana Spent (was 10-14% at all levels)
Cast time 0.6s; Mana +25%; splits to 6-9 targets (was 4-7)
6% max Life as Fire (was 4%); +300% AoE consuming corpse (was 200%); cast 0.65s (was 0.7)
Crit 5% (was 6%); Burning Ground +15% dmg; 430% eff (was 340%); 1722-2583 (was 1501-2252); Mana -20%
Targets once per 0.5-0.4s (was 0.7-0.5); 50% Shock (was 20%); 130% eff; 70-1336 (was 56-1067); Mana +25%
Targets once per 0.65-0.55s; 50% Shock; 470% eff (was 350%); 262-4980 (was 203-3858); Mana +25%
No longer supports Skills with Cooldowns
150% Arcane Might (was 200%); added phys 10-15% max Life (was 10-17%)
Hits 8-15 (was 6-12); Shocks as 200% more (was 20-39); cast 0.6s; Mana +25%
Can dash over terrain (not through enemies)
Buff removed if you lose the Ravenous Skill (e.g. unequip boots)
Teleports if no detonation in past 0.5s (was 1s); cast 0.16s; Mana +25%
35-60% base Atk Dmg (was 20-50); Atk Spd 115% (was 100%); 6-9 Mana (was 7-10); radius 1.8m (was 1.5)
Crit 10% (was 5.5); 60% lightning→chaos (was 40%); explosion 10% corpse Life (was 6%); 250% eff (was 230%); 993-1845 (was 906-1683)
50-44% less Damage (was 68-62%); +1 projectile (was 3→4); 10% more Atk Time/proj (was 5%); 200% mult (was 150%)
5% CD recovery per 100 Ward up to 400% (was uncapped)
No longer +max Life if only minion; now 24-28% less Damage taken if only minion
Reworked & renamed Communion Support: Spell hits, not minion skills; 20-30 added phys per permanent minion @lvl3; 150 mult (was 100)
No longer 20-30% Fire Dmg; now 80-120% Global Crit (was 40-60%) + 30-50% DoT Mult for Ignite from Crits
Chaos Skill Eff Dur 40-80% (was 40); 80-120% Chaos (was 80-100); 10-20% AoE (was 10)
No longer 20-30% Chaos; +1 Max Power Charges; 5% cast/charge (was 2); 5 mana/charge (was 2)
2% PDR/hit per Siphon (was 1); Adds 20-23 to 26-30 phys (was 12-14 to 15-16)
Now on Leviathan/Velour/Warlock Greaves (was Titan/Slink/Sorcerer); always Corrupted w/ implicit. Purity L30 (was 25). +0-100 Life, 0-40% move, 0-200% armour/ev/ES. Divine to update.
Implicit Magnitudes Doubled; 300-400% Global Dmg (was 250-300); +1-5% all max res (was 1-4)
20-30% Mana Cost Eff of Minion Skills (was 10-20% reduced)
100% Mana Cost Eff for 2s after 800 mana spent (was 50% reduced)
Regen 1% Life/s per 500 Player max ES (was per 500 ES)
40-60% Mana Cost Eff of Minion Skills (was 20-30% reduced)
3% Spell Crit/100 Life, 3% Spell Dmg/100 Life (was 5)
No longer +lightning or +spell dmg; +1 Max Power Charges; +3 to 15-25 lightning/charge (was 9); 300 lightning taken/s/charge (was 200)
Adds 1-3 to 125-145 lightning to Ignited (was 1-3 to 62-70)
No longer 50-60% Spell Dmg; +2-4 Cold gem lvl (was +2); 80-140% Cold (was 40-50); 25-50% Freeze (was 8)
+60-80 max ES; ES = upfront cost every 3rd pay (was 5th)
No longer 10% phys/Endurance; 50% Brine Charge instead; 4% phys as cold+lightning/charge
Socketed gems 50% less Mana Cost (was 50% reduced)
Now Ornate Quiver (was Primal Arrow); +2 Sockets (3 total); Void Charge/sec (was 0.5); worse via Divine
Reduced Mana Cost implicits no longer roll on Synthesis uniques

Non-Unique Synthesised no longer obtainable (except corrupting Synthesis uniques to Rare). Fracturing Orbs/Fossils/Mists no longer state they don't work on Synthesised. Harvest Synthesise removed. Beastcraft split → Fracture Talisman mods.
Now Fracture a random Modifier; can't be used on Fractured/Influenced
Can no longer reroll into same-name Unique (e.g. Beacon of Madness, Volkuur's Guidance)
Can now be used on items with no out-of-range-scalable mods (consistent with Divine)
Mana / Reduced Mana Cost no longer Unveilable/Craftable on Rings; now Mana + Mana Cost Efficiency
Reduced Mana Cost of Attacks implicit replaced by Mana Cost Efficiency
No longer require Staff; Block Attack/Spell can roll on Staves
Up to +22% block if hit recently (was +15)
Demon's Horn/Opal/Tornado Wand: Spell Dmg implicits (was added dmg)
Extra tier added; highest +4 (was +3); all caster prefix dmg tiers buffed (up to 200%); Trap/Mine/Burning/Poison/Bleeding prefixes buffed; highest-tier more common
Added Damage to Spells prefixes buffed (higher tiers, staves bigger)
One-hand 40-109% Spell Crit (was 10-109); new Staves mods 50% higher; relevant Essence/Bench buffed
No longer roll on Sceptres/caster Staves; Stun Duration only on Maces/attack Staves/Swords/Axes/Bows
Top-tier cast speed same weighting as lower tiers (was lower)

Large set added: Aura Eff on Amulets, Mana Res Eff on Rings, +Charges on Rings/Shields/Amulets, Res caps, Versatile Combatant/Glancing Blows on Shields, block, ground-immunity, attribute/quality/level supports, explode-on-kill, etc.
Reduced AoE dmg taken, proj dmg taken, +4-5% block on Shields; lvl21/23 aura/curse skills; Burning Dmg on Helms; stationary/moving bonuses; cast speed from Warstaves; spell dmg from attack Daggers
15-25% Global Physical Dmg (was Global Damage) — affects existing
22-28% Cast Speed (was 12-15); local phys can roll on Warstaves; Two-Hand Axe +0.2-0.4m range (was 0.1-0.2, also 1H Axes/Swords)
Broken Promises, Imperfect Memories, Magnum Opus, Parasitic Passengers disabled; existing cannot be turned in.
Now states reward is Corrupted (descriptive only).
Now awards an Exceptional Support Gem.
Socket-colour reforge count reduced at all Ranks.
Do not drop from Red Beasts; beast-crafted as normal Talismans in Menagerie.
Same as base game but +5 max Fanatic Charges (was +3).
Armour/Weapon transform-all modifiers removed (Horned Scarab of Tradition stronger).
Expires faster on non-Players: lose soul every 0.2s if none gained in 2s (was 0.5s/4s).
Minion Fire/Cold/Lightning Explode rares now always explode after duration.
All classes can buy from Nessa after The Caged Brute.
All classes can buy from Yeena after Sharp and Cruel.
Templar gets on Intruders in Black; Witch/Shadow buy from Yeena.
Right-click icon to view equipped items (read-only).
Drains full stacks in reverse-add order (not one-at-a-time).
Shows Remnants affected + total in area.
Create/join Hideout areas without changing selected type.
More characters visible when no events/priv leagues.
Total effect shown on debuff bar.
Always copies advanced description; search matches advanced format.
Improved highlight on Passive & Atlas trees.

rows.k: Snipe Support granted Triggered Skills +2 arrows (3.27 bug)
Area of Effect applied to Elemental Hit twice (Spectrum unaffected)
Avoid Damage from Hits not capped at 75%
Delve Heist Reward Chests still appearing in Contracts/Blueprints
Dying Light card unobtainable from Maven's Invitation: The Feared
It That Was Tul/Esh could Hinder immune targets
Ailith Skill Damage Atlas Passives not affecting some Skills
Could chance Blighted Maps to Unique
Immortal Call 15% less phys/Endurance counted minimums
Orb of Storms/Squalls Mana higher at lvl1 than other levels
Cleave/Vaal Cleave +0.1m/nearby quality gave no benefit past 1% (now +0-0.1m)
Runegraft of Treachery auras still applied some with Hand of Phrecia
Cadigan's Authority totem limit bypass via minions
Hand of Phrecia Non-Curse Aura eff unscaleable by Volatile Vaal
Prevent-block did not prevent blocking reflected damage (Saffell's Frame)
Guardian's Harmony of Purpose could pick same Shrine twice
Shield of Light damaging area ≠ visual AoE
Unholy Might only granted Wither-on-hit for attacks
Dash failed over valid terrain if final invalid
Replica Lioneye's Paws Toxic Rain showed no stats on hover
Minions broke AI when stealing Fleeing modifier
Domain of Timeless Conflict monsters stood (visual)
Several Grandmasters not using Skills / not gaining aura/support bonuses
Smite gave Buff Aura on hitting a pot
Holy Sweep called Holy Hammers on chests
Bestiary Boss portals not using Spirit Portal Effect
Solaris Temple L1 oversized area generation
Solaris Temple L2 extremely long dead end
Several Passive stats unnecessarily described global
Reminder text missing from Passive popups
Alt on items hid advanced Enchantment info
Frost Blades of Katabasis DoT missing PVP scaling
Utmost Ubers Ruthless Keepers challenge reqs wrong
Hideout Music Player inaccessible on PC controller

sections.title: Reliquarian Ascendancy Nodes (Curse of the Allflame)

rows.neu: +2 to Level of all Vaal Skill Gems; Onslaught for 20s on using a Vaal Skill
25% chance to Suppress Spell Damage; 25% chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments; Recover 200 Life when you Suppress Spell Damage
+100 to max Life; Cannot be Knocked Back; Action Speed can't be below Base; Cannot Evade enemy Attacks; Cannot be Stunned
Removes all ES; Gain max Life instead of max ES from Armour; -12 max Life per Level
25% of Cold Dmg taken as Fire; 25% Lightning as Fire; 25% Physical as Fire
+1 to Level of all Spell Gems; 30% chance ES Recharge starts on Block
Trigger Level 20 Raise Spiders on Kill
Trigger Level 1 Suspend in Time on Casting a Spell
+1% Block per Summoned Skeleton; 2% Atk/Cast Speed per Raging Spirit; 0.6% Life regen/s per Zombie; 30% Mana Regen/s per Spectre
+8% Crit Mult per Power Charge; +0.3% Crit Chance per Power Charge; +3% Block Spell Dmg per Power Charge
Trigger Level 20 Molten Burst on Melee Hit; 20% Pen Fire Res
20% more Accuracy at max Frenzy; -1 max Frenzy; +100% Crit Mult at no Frenzy
Hits always Shock; no Physical Dmg; Herald of Thunder +100% buff eff & mana eff
Grants Summon Greater Harbinger of Directions; +40 Str & Dex
Gain Flask Charge on Crit; 20% phys as Cold (if Sapphire recent); 20% phys as Fire (if Ruby recent); 20% phys as Lightning (if Topaz recent)
Enemies Taunted by Warcries explode (8% max Life as Chaos); Warcry CD 4s
Impenetrable Shrine Buff w/ no Flasks (100% Armour/Evasion/ES)
Nearby Enemies convert 25% phys to Fire; +15% Strength
-5% all max Ele Res; Ele Res capped by highest max Ele Res
40% increased Ailment Duration on Enemies; Cover in Ash 5s on Ignite; Cover in Frost 5s on Freeze
Skills Chain +1; Chained hits gain 20% non-Chaos as extra Chaos
Cannot be Stunned; 20% max Life as ES
Mercenary can wear Unique weapon/shield/quiver; Merc + minions deal 8% more dmg per Unique you have equipped
-50% Link Skill cost; infinite Link duration; Link won't kill you if Merc dies
Light Radius increases/reductions also apply to Link Skill buffs on Merc
If Merc Life > yours: takes 20% dmg from hits before you; if vice versa: 40% of dmg taken as Life recoup
Merc can Taunt on hit; +50% Non-Curse Aura eff on Merc

meta.title: Path of Exile 3.29 — Curse of the Allflame
meta.author: Stacey_GGG
